tasks.title: Implement core todo.js CLI app
tasks.description: Single-file Node.js CLI with add, list, done, remove commands. Persists to todos.json. No external dependencies.
tasks.notes: Delivered in PR #1 together with T-002 and T-003. 24/24 tests pass.

tasks.title: Write todo.test.js tests
tasks.description: Test file using only Node.js built-ins. All success criteria commands must have test coverage. Run with: node todo.test.js
tasks.notes: Delivered in PR #1 together with T-001 and T-003. 24 tests, 0 failures.

tasks.title: Write README.md
tasks.description: Document all CLI commands with usage examples. Explain todos.json persistence and how to run tests.
tasks.notes: Delivered in PR #1 together with T-001 and T-002.
